password_reset_request_desc: Enter the email address for your account and we will send a password reset link to that inbox.
password_reset_request_hint: After submitting, check your inbox for a password reset email. If it does not arrive, check spam or try again later.
password_reset_request_sent: Password reset request submitted. Check your inbox.
reset_password_desc: Set a new password for your account. Existing sessions will be signed out after the reset completes.
reset_password_success_login: Password reset complete. Sign in with your new password.
reset_password_missing_token_desc: This link does not contain a usable password reset token.
reset_password_invalid_desc: This password reset link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
reset_password_expired_desc: This password reset link has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
invitation_page_desc: Confirm the invited account, then create the account or resolve the current signed-in session.
invitation_register_desc: Choose a username and password to finish registration.
invitation_accepted_login: Invitation accepted. Sign in with your new account.
invitation_same_account_desc: The current signed-in account matches this invitation. This link is only required when creating a new account and usually does not need to be used again.
invitation_account_mismatch_desc: Sign out of the current account before using this invitation link to create an account.
invitation_switching_desc: Signed out of the current account. Preparing the invitation registration flow.
invitation_signed_in_same_email_desc: You are currently signed in as {{email}}. This invitation link is only required when creating a new account.
invitation_signed_in_different_email_des: The current signed-in account is {{currentEmail}}, while this invitation link applies to {{invitedEmail}}. Sign out of the current account before accepting the invitation.
invitation_loading_desc: Verifying that this invitation is still available.
invitation_missing_desc: This link does not contain a usable invitation token.
invitation_invalid_desc: This invitation link is invalid or no longer available.
invitation_expired_desc: This invitation has expired. Ask an administrator to send a new one.
invitation_revoked_desc: This invitation was revoked by an administrator.
invitation_accepted_desc: This invitation has already been used. Sign in with the account created from it.
